englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) Having no influence or significance on the issue at hand.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً) بدون تأثیر یا اهمیت در موضوع مورد بحث.
examples: The fact that pledges willingly submit themselves to hazing is neither here nor there, and any organization that engages in hazing will lose its charter.
